ogTitle: Sleepy Hollow vs Smeaton Grange: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sleepy Hollow and Smeaton Grange.
heading: Sleepy Hollow vs Smeaton Grange — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sleepy Hollow, New South Wales and Smeaton Grange, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Smeaton Grange has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sleepy Hollow (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sleepy Hollow or Smeaton Grange safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sleepy Hollow has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Smeaton Grange scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sleepy Hollow scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Smeaton Grange scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sleepy Hollow or Smeaton Grange?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Smeaton Grange has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
